title: Savory Fluffy Lasagne Sheets
description: A delicious savory dish suitable for a solo dinner in the style of an Australian recipe featuring flaky lasagne sheets that are kneadable and halal-friendly.
instructions: Place the lasagne sheets on a clean surface and sprinkle with vegetable broth. Knead the sheets gently until they are evenly moistened.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and sauté for about 3 minutes or until browned.
Add garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Distribute half of the seasoned meat mixture evenly on one-third of a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Place lasagne sheets over the meat in overlapping circles.
Pour remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable broth over the lasagne sheets.
Add more seasoning (salt, black pepper) to taste and then sprinkle chopped parsley over the top.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top. Let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
